candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows 100% conviction SHORT but green_matches=0, treat conviction as unconfirmed and require a non-zero historical green_match before sizing above 0.5x.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches counts how often the current live indicator configuration has historically aligned with a profitable forward move. A conviction of 100% with green_matches=0 means the consensus is internally agreed but has NEVER been validated against realized outcomes in memory — it is narrative coherence (many indicators agree) without statistical utility (no proven forward edge). Institutionally, broad indicator agreement at range-mid (RSI ~52-53 per briefing) reflects crowded positioning that mean-reverts, not directional commitment.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier = min(size_multiplier, 0.5)
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Reduces drawdown contribution from unvalidated high-conviction signals; expected Sharpe +0.02 to +0.04 by cutting variance on the 4/5 pairs currently flashing 100% conv with zero green_matches.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows GBPUSD (100% conv, green_matches=0, hist_hr=67%), EURUSD (100% conv, green_matches=0, hist_hr=66%), USDJPY (100% conv LONG, green_matches=0, hist_hr=0%), AUDUSD (92% conv, green_matches=0, hist_hr=72%) — every high-conviction signal currently has zero green_matches, and USDJPY pairs a 100% LONG conviction with a 0% historical hit rate, the exact narrative-over-statistics trap Tenet 1 warns against.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightened the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 on a bull-market premise; current regime is UNKNOWN/MOMENTUM with a defensive risk-off weekly tape per briefing — the bull-market assumption underpinning the gate may no longer hold, warranting a regime recheck.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in the last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and TradingView providing 0 signals — the system is correctly idle/unreliable rather than forcing entries, but the consensus layer is emitting 100%-conviction signals with no green_match validation, so any reactivation must gate on harvest-proven configurations before sizing up.
